scope: Cost and latency projection from saved artifacts and optional price environment variables.

estimated_cost_per_100_docs.formula: no external parser or LLM price

scenarios.use_when: Input is already text-like or Office-native and page-level PDF layout is not required.
PDF output needs page-level provenance, layout artifacts, or local audit trail.
Need CPU-friendly PDF parsing and can accept online API page/provenance limitations.
Task is ambiguous, schema is custom, or the result needs post-parse risk review.

decision_tree.condition: HTML, DOCX, PPTX, or trusted text-like input
decision_tree.reason: No external parser seconds in saved artifacts; enough for structure, field evidence, and retrieval export.

decision_tree.condition: PDF requiring page-level provenance or full MinerU artifacts
decision_tree.reason: Saved CLI PDF cases provide page provenance and intermediate artifacts, with higher runtime.

decision_tree.condition: CPU-only environment or quick PDF smoke
decision_tree.reason: Runs without local GPU but can lack page provenance; fallback to CLI when audit requires it.

decision_tree.condition: Ambiguous task, custom schema, or high-risk review
decision_tree.suggested_mode: enable LLM preplanning and post-parse review
decision_tree.reason: Adds target schema, verification focus, and recovery suggestions; token cost should be tracked.

notes: Prices are not hard-coded because competition/cloud prices can change.
Set the listed environment variables to turn formulas into currency estimates.
Saved quality metrics are lightweight label checks, not full OCR or table-cell benchmarks.
